Spokane Gas company, the successor
of the Spokane Falls Gaslight COM
pany, were filed with the county audi
tor at noon. The enabling clauses
are very comprehensive as to the
scope Of the operations possible to be
undertaken by the new concern, the
future being drawn on to the extent
Of q clause regarding heat and light
by means of gas, electricity or any
other substance or process now
known or which may hereafter be
discovered"


The term of The company's exist
sncs 10 placed At so years and it's
capital stock at s475,000, with $50
shares Of preferred stock and 1000
common.


The trustees named are Isaac W.
Anderson, William A. Aldrich. George
Ladd Mum. Daniel w. Twohy, Alon-
20 NJ. Murphey. James 7. Gum and
James +. Smythe. the first two named
being non-residsnts of the state of
